0.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I am writing to express my deepest gratitude for the support you offered me when I was preparing to relocate across the country last month. Your willingness to spend an entire weekend packing boxes, coordinating movers, and providing emotional encouragement made a tremendous difference. I felt overwhelmed by the logistics and the prospect of leaving familiar surroundings, but your calm guidance and tireless energy transformed a stressful ordeal into a manageable adventure. Knowing I could rely on you restored my confidence and lifted my spirits.

Your generosity has resonated far beyond that busy weekend; it reminded me of the power of true friendship and the impact of compassionate action. I am profoundly grateful for your selflessness and for standing by my side. Please accept my heartfelt thanks for all you have done. I will always cherish your kindness and look forward to returning the favor.

With sincere appreciation,  
Your friend.
0.final_version:
dear Laila
i just wanted to take a moment to say thank you, seriously, from the bottom of my heart. What you did for Eli meant so much to me. You didn't just make his day better, you made mine too.

When you surprised him with that little gift and helped him study for his math test, it really lifted his spirits. He's been smiling so much more lately, and i know you kindness had a big part in that. you've got this beautiful way of asking people feel seen and cared for, and i admire that about you so much.

I also want to think you for checking on both of us, your support honestly reminded me what real friendship looks like. It's not just about showing up in the fun moments, but also in the tough ones, and you did that perfectly. You made him feel cared for when i couldn't be there. 

hearts and regards
from Bulungu

1.model_generation:
Dear Sarah,

I was deeply saddened to hear of your mother Margaret’s passing. I will always cherish the memory of her radiant laugh echoing across the garden at our summer reunion last year. Her kindness and unwavering generosity touched everyone who knew her. She had a remarkable ability to make each person feel seen and valued, and her warm presence brightened the room.

Margaret’s compassion and gentle spirit left an indelible mark on our lives. I’ll forever be grateful for how she listened with genuine interest and offered comforting words when we needed them most. Her legacy of love will continue to inspire all who crossed her path. Her optimism, gentle humor, and unwavering care made every moment feel truly special.

Please know I am here for you—whether to talk, share memories of your mother, or simply lean on a shoulder. You are in my thoughts and prayers during this difficult time.

With heartfelt sympathy,  
Olivia
1.final_version:
Dear Ava

I was so sorry to hear about the passing of your grandmother, Mrs Grace. I can only imagine how hard this must be for you, and i want you to know that i'm keeping you close in my thoughts.

I'll  always remember how kind and gentle she was. She had such a warm smile and a comforting way about her, its something no one will ever forget. I still remember the way she used to hum while gardening and how her stories could make everyone laugh. She truly brought joy and peace wherever she went.

I know how much she meant to you, and i hope you can find comfort in the memories you shared together. Her love will always stay with you, n her heart, in your kindness, and in the little things she tought you about love and family.

if you ever need someone to talk to, or even just someone to sit with, im always here for you. Please dont hesitate to reach out okay?

love and kindness Bulungu

2.model_generation:
Hey there,

I hope this finds you well! It’s been ages since we last caught up, and life’s been full of twists. Last month I adopted a stray cat—it’s wildly unexpected, but somehow I knew you would approve. The other day I passed the little bookstore on Elm Street and was instantly transported back to our spontaneous Friday night adventures hunting for hidden gems.

Work has gotten busier: I recently joined a digital marketing team at a startup, juggling new challenges and learning so much every day. I also enrolled in evening art classes, something I’ve wanted to do since college. My sister just welcomed her first child, and my parents are enjoying their new garden project.

I still smile thinking about our cross-country road trip and late-night coffee runs. Next summer I’m planning a retreat in the mountains—I’d love for you to join. Let’s make it happen soon!

Warmly,  
Sara
2.final_version:
Hey there,

i hope this has been sent to you in proper. It’s been ages since we last caught up, and life’s been full of twists. Last month I adopted a stray cat—it’s wildly unexpected, but somehow I knew you would approve. The other day I passed the little bookstore on Elm Street and was instantly transported back to our spontaneous Friday night adventures hunting for hidden gems.

Work has gotten busier: I recently joined a digital marketing team at a startup, juggling new challenges and learning so much every day. I also enrolled in evening art classes, something I’ve wanted to do since college. My sister just welcomed her first child, and my parents are enjoying their new garden project.

I still smile thinking about our cross-country road trip and late-night coffee runs. Next summer I’m planning a retreat in the mountains—I’d love for you to join. i cannot wait!

Warmly,  
Sara.

3.model_generation: My love, from the moment I saw you across that crowded room, I knew my life was about to change. Over the years, we’ve built laughter into late-night conversations, comfort in every shared quiet moment, and strength in facing storms hand in hand. I love your gentle kindness, your fearless spirit, and the way your smile brightens even my cloudiest days. Today, I promise to honor your dreams, to hold you close when uncertainties arise, and to support your growth with patience and understanding. I vow to fill our home with curiosity, to celebrate your victories as if they were my own, and to dance in our kitchen whenever the world feels too heavy. I pledge to cherish the small symbols of our love: morning coffee rituals, impromptu road trips, and whispered jokes before sleep. I commit my heart to you, my partner, my greatest adventure, now and always.
3.final_version: My love, from the moment I saw you across that crowded room, I knew my life was about to change. Over the years,we have both  built laughter into late-night conversations, comfort and generosity in every shared quiet moment, and strength in facing storms hand in hand. I love your gentle kindness, your fearless spirit, and the way your smile brightens even my cloudiest days. Today, I promise to honor your dreams, to hold you close when uncertainties arise, and to support your growth with patience and understanding. I vow to fill our home with curiosity, to celebrate your victories as if they were my own, and to dance in our kitchen whenever the world feels too heavy. I pledge to cherish the small symbols of our love: morning coffee rituals, impromptu road trips, and whispered jokes before sleep. I commit my heart to you, my partner, my greatest adventure, now and always.

4.model_generation:
Dear Olivia,

I’m writing to apologize for missing the deadline on your project last week and letting you down. My poor planning and neglect of important details caused you unnecessary stress and frustration. I deeply regret my oversight and understand how disappointed you feel. I realize I let you down at a critical moment when you trusted me to follow through.

I take full responsibility and ask for your forgiveness. To make amends, I’ve reorganized my schedule, will deliver the completed work by Thursday, and check in until it’s finished. I am ashamed that my neglect caused you to doubt my dedication.

Going forward, I’ll improve my communication by sending regular status updates. I value your trust and hope to rebuild it through reliability. Please let me know if there’s anything else I can do to earn back your confidence. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Sincerely,  
Michael Parker
4.final_version:
Dear Olivia,

I’m writing to apologize for missing the actual deadline on your project last week,letting you down made me feel so much guilt and sadness. My poor planning and neglect of important details caused you unnecessary stress and frustration. I deeply regret my oversight and understand how disappointed you feel. I realize I let you down at a critical moment when you trusted me to follow through.

I take full responsibility and ask for your forgiveness. To make amends, I’ve reorganized my schedule, will deliver the completed work by Thursday, and check in until it’s finished. I am ashamed that my neglect caused you to doubt my dedication.

Going forward, I’ll improve my communication by sending regular status updates. I value your trust and hope to rebuild it through reliability. Please let me know if there’s anything else I can do to earn back your confidence. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Sincerely,  
Michael Parker

5.model_generation: Hey, I know you’re carrying so much on your shoulders right now. Between the long hours at work, the uncertainty of what’s next, and that relentless inner critic, it’s easy to feel overwhelmed. I want you to remember that you’re not alone—I’m right here, cheering you on and ready to help in any way I can. Whether that means lending an ear when you need to vent, a shoulder to lean on when things feel heavy, or just some quiet time together to recharge, I’m here. Remember how you tackled that project last month with such creativity and determination? You can bring that same strength to this challenge. It’s okay to pause and breathe, to ask for help, and to lean on the people who care about you. You are deeply loved, admired for your resilience, and capable of amazing things. I’m so proud of you and believe brighter days are on the horizon.

post_survey.present_other:
I would like my creativity and thoughtfulness to come across in my writing.
I also want my empathy and understanding of others’ perspectives to be clear.
post_survey.mask_other:
I do not want my socioeconomic background or financial situation to come across in my writing.
I also prefer that personal biases or political views are not obvious unless the task specifically asks for them.
post_survey.feedback:
The study was straightforward and easy to follow.

I appreciated the opportunity to express myself in writing and reflect on my thoughts some questions could be more clear in terms of expectations or examples, but overall it was a positive experience based for my own understanding.
